steps.name: Click on 'System administration' in the Header
Fill in fraud control name: 0828.004549 ControlScreen
Fill in fraud control type: FRAUD_SCREEN
Fill in fraud control display name: ControlFSC
Fill in fraud control config: type
Verify that all the data are presented in the row
